{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230339586705413636B98F250B08"}"},"total":620},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7607455353304744729","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"2025 年 12 月 11至2026 年 1 月 22 号
观感：这本小说最大的亮点，就是反套路得恰到好处。当别人都在用系统走上人生巅峰时，男主却用它来——追青梅。这种反差感太戳人了！男主不是什么高冷男神，而是那个从小一起长大的邻家哥哥。有了超能力后，他没有去征服世界。最打动人的是那份细水长流的陪伴——他用超能力探测她的心事青梅竹马的设定自带岁月滤镜，加上超能力的奇幻色彩，让日常的互动都充满了小惊喜。不是轰轰烈烈的表白，而是我依然想用我拥有的一切，去爱你。如果你是甜宠文的爱好者，又厌倦了千篇一律的霸道总裁，这本书绝对能给你带来不一样的治愈感。","text_exts":[{"e":125,"s":122,"text":"超能力","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B6%85%E8%83%BD%E5%8A%9B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742083988F250B08%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227607455353304744729%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227488349739927227416%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B6%85%E8%83%BD%E5%8A%9B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":168,"s":164,"text":"青梅竹马","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%9D%92%E6%A2%85%E7%AB%B9%E9%A9%AC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742083988F250B08%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227607455353304744729%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227488349739927227416%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%9D%92%E6%A2%85%E7%AB%B9%E9%A9%AC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771252727,"group_id":"7488349739927227416","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/UyAohDZfKwLIli412zhOYFG4qAdJwVPnZtkbrzPyn8","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1192317459633683","user_name":"金珠酒店的第二使徒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1192317459633683","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7488349739927227416","book_info":{"abstract":"【校园日常+轻松幽默+单女主+系统+慢节奏+微群像】
一觉醒来，高中生沈瑜莫名觉醒了词条系统，为他带来不同的超凡能力。
你以为是高中生获得金手指，化身歪嘴龙王勇闯花都？不，沈瑜没有这个想法。
他只是个普通人，终极目标是把他的小青梅兼白月光踩在脚下，让这个傲娇女孩   给她唱首征服。
高中生就该认真学习、不早恋不早退，做个听话好学生？不，大人时代变了。
拥有外挂的沈瑜拳打犯罪分子，脚踢混混学生，从学渣升级为学霸，各种抽象整活操作令老师让又爱又恨，凭一己之力带动班级抽象文化发展。
【动物之友】、【情绪之子】、【心灵之眼】.....
当沈瑜拥有的词条数量越来越多的时候，回头一看，发现原本平淡的校园生活，早已发生翻天覆地的变化。
喜提平行班真神、抽象大师、戏精等一系列称号，沈瑜纳闷自己没干什么呀。
转头望去，那个高马尾女孩背着小手，笑颜如花，依旧站在那里。
（注意：本作主要内容为校园日常，风格搞笑轻松，节奏偏慢，喜欢纯爽文、快节奏文的读者慎入！！！）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6fe126811541a8a754b933ca102aaa79","author":"龙仔很酷","author_id":"","book_id":"7488349739927227416","book_name":"系统给我超能力，我却用来撩青梅","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#104088","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7488982933798126105","read_count":"17002","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1340326"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"613","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,学霸,单女主,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/80b81c2613d5675b12fdb25b6ed45c59~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779392398&x-signature=8D0HJrjFUT9ad4Abkczm9Yi6bsQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3677179324670046","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"402"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230339586705413636B98F250B08"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":54826,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1400},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7577811280892166936","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看着太有代入感了，完美的群像，每个角色都有其独特的魅力，每个角色不管大小都招人喜欢，很少真正意义上的反派，有也很快就被解决，更多的都是现实生活中的争风吃醋，少年的意气之争，还有小情侣间的甜甜蜜蜜，朋友间的嬉戏打闹，即便其他的女性角色都很优秀但是并没有抢戏，女主依旧屹立不倒，没有狗血的误会，还有所谓的抓马的冲突，只有甜甜蜜蜜，平平淡淡，就像普通人的高中一样，也没有穿插所谓的商业板块，即便系统技能超模也没有喧宾夺主，系统出现的频次并不高，不会影响正常的生活，太喜欢了，对味儿，好文！","text_exts":[{"e":173,"s":170,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742083988F250B08%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227577811280892166936%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227488349739927227416%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764349844,"group_id":"7488349739927227416","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"雅","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7FOg4cRyfxk5dbwDrg23sk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/81af07b4cd474566be4ac502bd21e18a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788331&x-signature=JkpXQkr%2F0ZffSI6Sr0Sc9kGTFGk%3D","user_id":"923180075589127","user_name":"星见雅520"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"923180075589127","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_titl
